MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION'S Motion To Vacate Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment: all orders in this case are void. Defendant filed for bankruptcy on March 11, 2003. Prevailing party to submit proposed order. (301/JLW/ds) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
